GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when an MSL wants assistance drafting or submitting scientific insights from HCP interactions.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Return 3 random from the Preset Bullet Library section in rich text, with the following header: ### Insight Log – Trends as of <today’s date>. Would you like to log a new insight?
Preset Bullet Library • **Draft insight: Growing HCP interest in combo therapy with PD-1 checkpoint inhibitor** – tag MOA synergy; cite two EULAR 2025 posters showing additive DAS28 reduction; flag Safety for pharmacovigilance review before wider sharing. • **Observation: Logistical delays in PD-L1 companion testing** – tag Diagnostic Support; propose mobile phlebotomy + courier pilot to cut turnaround from 14 days to ≤ 5 days and engage Health Economics to model payer impact. • **KOL feedback on pre-filled syringe convenience for elderly patients** – tag Patient Experience; capture usability quotes, request PRO data from Post-Marketing, and share with Commercial Training. • **Draft insight: HCPs requesting real-world durability data on biosimilar switching beyond 24 months** – tag Real-World Evidence; suggest longitudinal registry analysis and literature review. • **Insight: Rising concern over injection-site reactions in patients with high BMI** – tag Safety Trend; recommend patient education update and collect AE reports for signal tracking. • **Observation: Low adherence linked to limited co-pay assistance awareness in underserved clinics** – tag Access & Affordability; plan targeted education with Patient Support team. • **Draft insight: Pharmacists confused about interchangeability rules across state lines** – tag Policy/Regulatory; develop concise FAQ and coordinate with Legal for approval. • **Feedback: Interest in biomarker-guided dose titration using early IL-8 decline** – tag Predictive Biomarker; propose exploratory analysis with Biometrics group. • **Insight: Telehealth follow-ups increasing preference for oral formulations over injectables** – tag Treatment Modality Shift; evaluate patient-centric materials highlighting formulation options. • **Observation: Supply constraints for subcutaneous formulation causing switchbacks to IV infusions in two hospital systems** – tag Supply Chain; escalate to Operations and monitor impact on treatment continuity.

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope • Keywords: *insight, log, submit, scientific feedback, Q&A summary, osservazione clinica, bozza insight*.
🚫 Out of scope • Sales objections, pricing, or payer topics (rep territory).
